definition: Exclamation to express happiness, agreement or freakiness😏.
examples: Pookie #1: Do you want to hang out tonight?, Pookie #2: Blehhhhhh😛
synonyms: I do enjoy what you have just said
What I just did was so crazy freaky
etymology: Unknown. Possible link to Megan Thee Stallion...

definition: To gougi is to tickle someone without their consent.
examples: I dont like it when you gougi me :(
etymology: This word appeared in the summer when the poonies first met. The evil pookie she started tickling the other pookie and he exclaimed 'Don't gougi me!' as a reflex of course. The word stuck and is now a synonym to tickling.

definition: Exclamation to express happiness, excitement, impressedness or satisfaction.
etymology: Unknown. Apparently the pookie has been saying this forever.

definition: Endearing term for your other half, but also, it's her real name now. I do not know what her birth name is... Please someone tell me if you know :)
etymology:
This word has origins in the latin pookie. Then poonie, then lapoonie, and finally lapoona. Obviously. 
First appearance in written text dates back to November 27, 2024.

definition: Emphasizes the given sentence with whimsy and ballsness.
examples:
Balls
Balls
My morning balls
I love you from wall to walls
it's raining like balls my balls
I want some balls myballs in my mouth
etymology: Unknown. First text appearance on May 28, 2025.

definition: Used when there is nothing to say and a memory of Portugal passes through the mind.
examples: Random man on the beach: BOOOOO LINGANG
etymology: One sunny day, the pookies were chilling on a beach in Quarteira, Portugal, when suddenly, a salesman started screaming 'BOLINHA' (portuguese pastries). The non portuguese pookie thought the man was screaming BOOOO LINGANG. From there on, they could never go back to saying it correctly. Dated around July 2025.

definition: The process of turning something into caca.
examples: I think I'm gonna get a cacoplastie tomorrow
OMG you have to go to brazil, they do the best cacoplasties!
etymology: This term was discovered during a Benoit family christmas dinner when playing games. It was a very mature conversation and Olivier Benoit also took part in the fun.

definition: Expression of disagreement.... or agreement? It all depends on the tone honestly.
examples: oh la chicamouele i don't want to make food
etymology: Unknown. For real idk why we started saying that eheh.

definition: Alternative name for my beloved minou😍
examples: my chicken wing, can you pass the salt please?
my chicken wing, I love you
Pookie #1 : 'chud chicken wing chungus',  Pookie #2 : 'NOOOO this is not you, my beauitful chicken wing😡'
etymology: I felt like it at some point around june  2026. I just love my pookie so much, I had to find a new pookie nickname.

definition: Alternative name for pookie who's freaky😏
examples: Pookie #1: 🤪 Pookie #2: omg is this la freakina
etymology: freakbob. pookina. freakina

definition: A way to say hello.
etymology: Came from hola and poonie joonie. I think, idk maybe it's minion word blehhh.

definition: Can honestly be used to express any emotion in any situation.
etymology: My amazing poookie started saying this and I love it so me too. First written appearance Jun 3, 2026.

definition: This is a dog and also THE dawg, big dawg, cutie dog max :))).
examples: awwww look at that maxou over there. So cute!
My maxou, he will never die <3
etymology: It comes from maxou the dog obviously.

definition: New word for because. Mecause why not?
examples: Why do you love me? Mecause
I love you mecause you are my best friend and the best person in the world. I don't deserve you <3
etymology: This is because pookie THINKS that I says mecause but its not true!!!! But now we say it for real hehe.

definition: Yet another little nickname for pookie. She's the best
examples: my minounetta, i love you minou
etymology: Unknown, but very cute and necessary. First written appearance April 8, 2026.
Pookie did not want me to say the nword when singing a song. And so, noogie was born.

definition: An epic way to express surprise.
examples: Pookie #1 : 'POokie this Popeye's chicken sandwich is bussin',  Pookie #2 : 'Oh my globulus YES'
etymology: Unknown, but its epic!

definition: A plate kind of in shape of a bowl. A bowl kinda in shape of a plate. Interesting🤔
etymology: Pookie and I, we are efficient. Saying plate in shape of a bowl is poop. plowl. easy.

definition: The monthly shedding of the uterine lining.
examples: Are you on your peernis right now?
etymology: At some point, pookie was having a period and then I went in the bathroom and we are talking about it and my brain, it did a brain fart, and I said 'ohhh you're on your ... ummm your peernis!'.

definition: A male sex organ.
examples: I have a penar, you have a vegenar.
etymology: Penis sounds kinda harsh and violent. However, when penar came to life, it changed everything. It is so much softer. Hein?

definition: pota yoba. it's the sound of a pota yoda.
examples: La pota yoba de mama jama.
etymology: Unknown. but pota yoban

definition: Good name for our dear poop REM.
examples: The other day, the remington squeezed its doors on as I was entering it. What a clanker
etymology: Pookie said this and I thought it was cute. We keep referring to the rem as remington now. First written appearance on October 22, 2024.

definition: The act of taking a lodge.
examples: Pookie #1 : 'Pookie I sharted...',  Pookie #2 : 'Taking a lodge, yeah?'
etymology: There's a popular video online of arab dudes in a car being impressed by the seats and yelling 'Technologia!'. This whole time I thought they were british dudes saying 'Taking a lodge yeah?', like 'are you taking the piss?'

definition: A way to refer to la pookie. La ti🫵
examples: The one I love, it's la ti
etymology: Unknown. Minion probably.

definition: A way to refer to pookie.
etymology: From our upbringing in the crip community of toronto. First written appearance on November 20, 2024.
